# Pull Request

### Related Issue

Closes #(issue number)

## Summary of changes
<!-- List the specific modifications with technical details -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Select all that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change addressing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking enhancement to functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (modifications affecting existing functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Pre-Submission Checklist

- [ ] Commit history is clean with descriptive messages
- [ ] Code adheres to ROS naming conventions and project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed; all changes are necessary and correct
- [ ] All comments are clear and descriptive, especially for algorithmic complexity
- [ ] Related documentation and launch files have been updated
- [ ] No compiler warnings or linter errors introduced
- [ ] Build passes locally: `colcon build`
- [ ] `launch_stack.py` validated without errors
- [ ] Gazebo simulation tested (if applicable)
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added

## Additional Notes
<!-- Include any further context, known limitations, or future considerations -->
